pre_game.message: Hey, I'm E. It’s a bit nerve-wracking being in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What's your name?
Hey E, I'm B. It definitely is, but I'm just trying to stay focused on the prize—I really need this win for my family.
I hear you, B. I’m in the same boat, doing this for the people I care about. What would this prize mean for your family if you take it home?
It would mean everything, honestly—just some real security and the chance to finally get ahead of the bills for once.
I totally get that. It’s heavy carrying that kind of pressure, but it’s a great reason to be here. I'm hoping to do the same for my circle.
For sure. It’s good to meet someone else who’s here for the right reasons—hopefully we can both walk away with something for our families.
I really hope so too; it definitely helps to know I'm not the only one here with so much on the line.
Exactly. It’s a lot to carry, but it helps knowing there are others here who understand what’s at stake.
Agreed. It’s good to have a friendly face in here before things get started. Let's hope we both make it through.
I'm with you. Good luck out there, E—I'll see you when the game starts.
Thanks, B. I appreciate that. Good luck to you too, and I'll see you in there.
